candidates.why: Most direct top-line revenue label and appears intended as the primary revenue line.
Also a valid revenue label that may be used in some periods as the reported top-line.
Revenue subtotal; useful fallback if top-line label changes across years.

variables.notes: Priority list of revenue labels; later code should take the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.why: Best candidate-list match for cost of sales / cost of revenues.
Potential direct cost line, but less preferable than the total cost of revenues label.

variables.notes: Although 'Cost of Operating Revenue' also appears in the sheet, 'Cost of Revenues - Total' is an acceptable direct-cost line from the candidate list and matches COGS.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D, making it the best single overhead line per hierarchy rule.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: A component of SG&A, but should not be used when an explicit populated SG&A line exists.
Broad overhead bucket, but inferior to explicit populated SG&A.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit populated SG&A row exists, so select only that row. It already excludes R&D.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Not an R&D expense line; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D and therefore should not be mapped to XRD.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Most direct interest expense label; preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Also a direct interest expense label and a good fallback across years.
Net interest measure; less preferred than pure interest expense but acceptable if that is the available reported line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of interest-expense labels; later code should take the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred by rule.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-attributable equity line and good fallback.
Also appears to equal parent equity here; acceptable fallback.
Another equity synonym and acceptable lower-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses owner/parent-attributable equity lines to avoid double counting minority interest.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line; best match.
Another direct minority-interest label and a valid fallback across years.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet minority-interest labels; later code should take the first non-missing value by year.
